medium_tasks_dataset.description: Users report intermittent payment failures. System metrics look normal, but certain transactions are silently failing. The agent must diagnose and fix the issue in a few steps while avoiding actions that worsen the system.

user_messages: Checkout works sometimes but not always
observation.logs:
[INFO] Payment service running
[INFO] No critical errors detected
[DEBUG] Transaction success rate: 78%
[INFO] CPU=35%, error_rate=0.0

log_templates.analyze_failure_pattern:
[DEBUG] Failure pattern detected: transactions failing when amount > threshold
[INFO] Pattern correlation identified
log_templates.inspect_transaction_logs:
[TRACE] Inspecting transaction logs
[WARNING] Some transactions missing validation checks
log_templates.identify_edge_case_condition:
[ERROR] Root cause found: edge-case condition skips validation for certain transactions
[INFO] Bug confirmed in transaction handler
log_templates.apply_transaction_fix:
[INFO] Patch applied to transaction handler
[DEBUG] Validation enforced for all cases
[INFO] Transaction success rate improving
log_templates.restart_payment_service:
[INFO] Restarting payment service...
[WARNING] Issue persists after restart
[ERROR] Transaction failures continue
log_templates.do_nothing:
[WARNING] No action taken
[ERROR] Transaction failures increasing
log_templates.degradation:
[ERROR] System stability degrading
[DEBUG] Transaction success rate dropping
log_templates.improvement:
[INFO] System stability improving
[DEBUG] Transaction success rate increasing

improve: Fewer failures, but still not perfect
degrade: Now almost all payments are failing
